seo.title: Early Arrival | ArdenNest — Ardennes
seo.description: Arrived early in the Ardennes? Discover our tips for pleasant excursions while the house is being prepared until 4 PM.

h1: Tips while you wait — outings near Gedinne until the house is ready at 4 PM
pageSubtitle: The house is being cleaned until 4 PM. Discover fun outings to fill the waiting time.
intro: The house is being cleaned until 4 PM on the day of arrival. To allow our cleaning team to work in peace, early check-in is unfortunately not possible. But don't worry — the area has plenty to offer to turn the waiting time into the start of your vacation.

destinations.name: Bouillon
destinations.description: The historic town with its imposing fortress high above the Semois. Stories of crusaders and medieval intrigue.

highlights.name: The Fortress
highlights.description: Walk through centuries-old corridors, enjoy the view. Children love the birds of prey show

highlights.name: Le Marché de Nathalie
highlights.description: Impressive selection of regional beers — bring some for the evening

destinations.name: Rochehaut
destinations.description: Picturesque village with perhaps the most beautiful view in the region. Perfect for a short stop with the whole group.

highlights.name: The Viewpoint
highlights.description: Breathtaking panorama over Frahan and the meandering Semois — Instagram material

highlights.name: Agri-Museum
highlights.description: Nice museum about rural life. Educational for young and old

destinations.name: Han-sur-Lesse
destinations.description: Best known for its caves, but the village has more to offer. Ideal for families with children.

highlights.name: The Caves of Han
highlights.description: Spectacular! Take an old tram to an underground world full of stalactites. Must-see

highlights.name: Wildlife Park
highlights.description: The largest in Belgium — spot wolves, lynxes and bears, on foot or by safari car

destinations.name: Monthermé (France)
destinations.description: Fancy a trip across the border? The drive itself is an experience — winding roads through dense forests along the Meuse.

highlights.name: Rent a boat
highlights.description: Explore the river at your own pace and enjoy the landscape from the water

highlights.name: French gastronomy
highlights.description: Enjoy a traditional dish with a good glass of wine in a local bistro

signature: ArdenNest • Festina Lente • Welcoming guests in the Ardennes since 2003
